case_title: SEAN MANUEL MOLINA et al VS. ZHI BAO YAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MOLINA, SEAN MANUEL (FATHER) COLLACO, ANGELINA (MOTHER) MOLINA, COURTNEY , A MINOR, BY AND THROUGH MOTHER, ANGELINA COLLACO AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ZHI BAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINA, SEAN MANUEL (FATHER) COLLACO, ANGELINA (MOTHER) MOLINA, COURTNEY , A MINOR, BY AND THROUGH MOTHER, ANGELINA COLLACO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YAN, ZHI BAO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR COURTNEY MOLINA (MINOR) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINA, SEAN MANUEL (FATHER) COLLACO, ANGELINA (MOTHER)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED JUN-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, ZHI BAO
ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. APPLICATION IS "GRANTED". - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
